questions.text: Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including: any commercial relationships with ServiceNow and/or Armis, and whether you consider your business competes with either of those businesses, and if so, identifying which of your products/services compete with which of their products/services.
Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition.
Do you think the Acquisition would enable ServiceNow to obtain access to any competitively valuable data that they would not otherwise have had access to?

questions.section: Questions for suppliers of IT operations management (ITOM) software
questions.text: Please describe your own, ServiceNow’s and its main competitors’ positions in the ITOM software category.

questions.section: Questions for suppliers of IT operations management (ITOM) software
questions.text: Does your business offer operational technology (OT) operations management (OTOM) products, OT security products and/or continuous threat exposure management (CTEM) products as part of (or ‘add-ons’ to) your business’s ITOM software offering? If so, are these products provided directly by your business or through third party integrations?

questions.section: Questions for suppliers of IT operations management (ITOM) software
questions.text: Does your ITOM product include agentic AI functionality, or offer this as an ‘add-on’? How important is that functionality to your customers?

questions.section: Question for suppliers of OT security products
questions.text: Please describe your own, Armis’, and its competitors’ positions in this category, and identify if your products are able to integrate/interoperate with any ITOM or OTOM products.

questions.section: Questions for customers of OT security products
questions.text: Please describe Armis’, ServiceNow’s and key competitors’ positions in OT security.

questions.section: Questions for customers of OT security products
questions.text: Does your business use an OTOM product? Are the OT security products you use integrated into/interoperable with that OTOM product(s)?

questions.section: Questions for customers of OT security products
questions.text: Which OT security provider do you currently use and how easily could you switch providers?

questions.section: Question for customers of ITOM software
questions.text: Describe ServiceNow’s market position, and that of its key competitors in ITOM software. Is there anything that sets ServiceNow apart?
Are ServiceNow and Armis close competitors in the supply of CTEM products? Who are the key competitors in this space?
Describe ServiceNow’s market position, and its key competitors in OTOM. Is there anything that sets ServiceNow apart?
